'''''Vembri''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] owned by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] working for [[Viraxo Industries]]. It was destroyed near [[Destreg II]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and his brother [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] after their failed assassination attempt on [[K'Armyn Viraxo]]'s life.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
